subject: Skwovet, a small grey squirrel-like creature, sitting on a fence post in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small, round, grey squirrel-like creature with a bushy striped tail sits upright on a fence post. It appears to be alert and watchful, with large round eyes and small rounded ears. Green grass and a bright outdoor background frame the scene. The creature's posture is active and curious, tail raised behind it.
foreground: small grey squirrel creature perched on fence post
background: green grass, bright outdoor setting, fence
